qa_pairs.question: What is the main purpose of this page within the technical documentation?
qa_pairs.answer: This page is intended to record changes to job scheduling policies that might alter the behaviour of job submission commands.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific job submission commands might be affected by the policy changes recorded on this page?
qa_pairs.answer: The job submission commands sbatch, salloc, and srun might be affected by the policy changes recorded on this page.
